subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the earth! The foul odour hath prevented the sweet fragrances of inner meanings from wafting, and the clamour of the ignorant hath drowned out the divine call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل ارض رایحه دفرآء تضوعات عرف معانی را منع نموده و ضوضاء جهلا ندای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @living waters; water of life, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
